title: Fix ProductDetail page to show all variants & nutritional info; fix Admin page

requirements.text: Rewrite the useGetProductByCategory hook in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts to correctly call the backend actor's getProductByCategory function using the productId URL parameter (category slug) exactly as-is, enable the query only when productId is defined and non-empty, handle null/undefined/empty optional responses from the backend as a 'not found' state without throwing, and return the unwrapped product data to the ProductDetail page.

quotes: in the next redirected page no product is showing

acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /products/rice calls getProductByCategory with argument 'rice' and returns the rice ProductDetail record
Navigating to /products/wheat calls getProductByCategory with argument 'wheat' and returns the wheat ProductDetail record
All six slugs (rice, wheat, pulses, spices, processed-food-products, makhana) successfully fetch their respective records
When the backend returns null or empty optional, the hook returns { data: undefined, isNotFound: true } without crashing
Query is disabled (enabled: false) when productId is undefined

requirements.text: Rewrite the ProductDetail page (frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx) to correctly display product data fetched from the backend for any of the six categories. The page must: (1) extract the productId param from the URL using TanStack Router's useParams; (2) pass it to the useGetProductByCategory hook; (3) display a loading state while fetching; (4) display a clear 'Product not found' message when the query returns no data; (5) on success, render: product name, category, description, price in ₹, specifications table, nutritional information per gram in a dedicated section, a Product Variants grid showing all variants with their names and images, a variant selector pre-populated with all variants, a quantity selector defaulting to 1 with increment/decrement controls, and an Add to Cart button calling addToCart from CartContext. Do not remove or break any existing working section.

quotes: in the next redirected page no product is showing
add all available varieties to select and shop, also add nutritional information

acceptanceCriteria: Loading spinner or skeleton shown while product data is being fetched
'Product not found' message displayed when backend returns no data for the slug
Product name, description, price in ₹, and category are visible
Specifications table renders all key-value pairs from the backend record
Nutritional information section renders per-gram values for all fields returned by the backend (calories, protein, carbohydrates, fat, fiber, minerals)
Product Variants grid shows all variants with name and image
Variant selector dropdown is pre-populated with all variant names
Quantity selector defaults to 1 and supports increment/decrement
Add to Cart button calls addToCart with selected variantName, unitPrice, and quantity
Success toast notification shown after adding to cart

requirements.text: Audit the backend/main.mo actor and backend/migration.mo migration module to ensure all six ProductDetail records are seeded in stable storage with category slugs exactly matching 'rice', 'wheat', 'pulses', 'spices', 'processed-food-products', and 'makhana'. Each record must include: name, category (lowercase hyphenated slug), description, specifications, price, imageUrl, fully populated nutritionData (calories, protein, carbohydrates, fat, fiber, and at least two minerals), and variants with name and imageUrl. The getProductByCategory function must look up records by these exact slugs. The migration must run on postupgrade without overwriting existing contact form or order data. If any record is missing or has an incorrect slug, seed or correct it.

quotes: in the next redirected page no product is showing
add all available varieties to select and shop

acceptanceCriteria: getProductByCategory('rice') returns a valid ProductDetail record
getProductByCategory('wheat') returns a valid ProductDetail record with Durum Wheat, Whole Wheat, Semolina variants
getProductByCategory('pulses') returns a valid ProductDetail record with all 7 pulse variants
getProductByCategory('spices') returns a valid ProductDetail record with all 8 spice variants
getProductByCategory('processed-food-products') returns a valid ProductDetail record with all 6 processed food variants
getProductByCategory('makhana') returns a valid ProductDetail record with Fox Nut Regular, Fox Nut Premium, Roasted Makhana, Makhana Powder variants
All records include nutritionData with at least calories, protein, carbohydrates, fat, fiber
Existing contact form submissions and orders are not lost after upgrade

requirements.text: Fix and fully restore the Admin page at frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx. The page must render two tabs without any import errors or TypeScript type errors: (1) 'Contact Submissions' tab — fetches and displays all contact form submissions in a table showing Name, Email, Phone Number, Message, and User Type; (2) 'Orders' tab — fetches all orders via useGetAllOrders and displays them in a table showing Order ID, Buyer Name, Email, Phone, Total Amount (₹), Status, and Date, with a per-row status update dropdown (pending/confirmed/processing/shipped/delivered/cancelled) that calls useUpdateOrderStatus when changed. Audit all imports (useGetAllOrders, useUpdateOrderStatus, CartContext, and any hooks used for contact submissions) and fix any broken references, missing hooks, or TypeScript errors preventing the page from loading.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin page loads without a white screen or runtime error
'Contact Submissions' tab renders a table with all submitted contact form entries
'Orders' tab renders a table with all orders from useGetAllOrders
Status dropdown per order row updates order status via useUpdateOrderStatus
No TypeScript compilation errors in Admin.tsx
All imports resolve correctly (no missing module errors)

requirements.text: Verify that the CartContext provider in frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx is fully implemented with addToCart, removeFromCart, updateQuantity, clearCart, cartTotal, and itemCount, and that the CartProvider wraps the entire app in frontend/src/App.tsx. Each cart item must include productId, productName, variantName, quantity, and unitPrice. Ensure the '/cart', '/checkout', and '/order-confirmation/$orderId' routes are all registered in App.tsx with lazy-loaded Cart, Checkout, and OrderConfirmation components.

quotes: add all available varieties to select and shop

acceptanceCriteria: CartContext is available on all pages without errors
addToCart, removeFromCart, updateQuantity, clearCart functions work correctly
cartTotal and itemCount are correctly computed
Cart icon in navigation shows correct item count
'/cart', '/checkout', '/order-confirmation/$orderId' routes render their respective pages without 404 errors

requirements.text: Generate representative static images for all product variants that may be missing from frontend/public/assets/generated/. Required filenames (must exactly match the imageUrl values stored in backend variant records): rice-basmati.png, rice-sona-masoori.png, rice-ir64.png, rice-brown.png, rice-broken.png, wheat-durum.png, wheat-whole.png, wheat-semolina.png, pulses-chana-dal.png, pulses-moong-dal.png, pulses-masoor-dal.png, pulses-urad-dal.png, pulses-toor-dal.png, pulses-rajma.png, pulses-kabuli-chana.png, spices-turmeric.png, spices-red-chilli.png, spices-coriander.png, spices-cumin.png, spices-black-pepper.png, spices-cardamom.png, spices-ginger-powder.png, spices-fenugreek.png, processed-rice-flour.png, processed-wheat-flour.png, processed-besan.png, processed-poha.png, processed-roasted-chana.png, processed-vermicelli.png, makhana-regular.png, makhana-premium.png, makhana-roasted.png, makhana-powder.png.

quotes: add all available varieties to select and shop

acceptanceCriteria: All 33 image files exist at frontend/public/assets/generated/ with the exact filenames listed
Variant images load without 404 errors on both the Products page and ProductDetail pages
Each image visually represents the corresponding ingredient or product

constraints: Do not modify any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
Do not alter existing navigation links, logo size (h-[77px]), or mobile menu structure in Navigation.tsx
Migration must not overwrite existing contact form submissions or order records
Do not remove or break existing working sections on the ProductDetail page (product image, specifications table)
nonGoals: Changing the overall site design, color palette, or layout
Adding new product categories beyond the existing six
Modifying the Home, About Us, Farmer Network, or Exports pages
Adding payment gateway or real payment processing
